ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., wind tunnel, flight simulation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "pwm" REAL /* Pulse Width Modulation (pwm) value */,
  "power" REAL /* Power value */,
  "net_force" REAL /* Net force value */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage value */,
  "current" REAL /* Current value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the latest version of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file in MB */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was set */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was changed or ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., pwm, power, net_force) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., %, W, N) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the version of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the readme file was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the readme file was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
